pricing.refundPolicy: No general refund policy. Refunds available only if KYC is refused. Optional add-ons available: 100% profit split upgrade and 7-day fast payout at additional cost.

payouts.schedule: Bi-weekly (14 days, or 7 days with add-on)

rules.consistencyRule: 15-40% depending on model. Pro and Instant accounts enforce consistency rules post-funding. Standard evaluation accounts have no consistency rule.
rules.notes: News trading allowed during evaluation but restricted once funded — 10-minute no-trade window around red folder events, full block during FOMC news. Copy trading allowed between own AquaFunded accounts or legally linked personal accounts. EAs allowed on all platforms — no tick manipulation, latency arbitrage, or HFT strategies. Hedging and martingale strategies permitted. No forced stop losses or lot size limits. Risk per trade should stay within 1-2%, margin use should not exceed 80%. All accounts are demo/simulated trading environments. Payments processed by Paytiko (cards, Apple Pay, crypto).

markets.instruments: Forex (28 pairs, up to 1:100 evaluation / 1:30-1:50 funded), Metals (2, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Indices (7, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Commodities (2, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Crypto (4, 1:2 leverage)

notableFlags: Trustpilot profile flagged for guideline breaches — fake reviews removed
Partners with ThinkMarkets and Purple Trading (undisclosed)

support.hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM Dubai time
